home.title: Modalia AI — A Safe AI Partner for Counselors
home.description: A safe AI partner for counselors. From session transcripts to case conceptualization and genograms, Modalia AI handles your whole counseling workflow in one secure place.

schema.orgDescription: Modalia AI is a safe AI partner for counselors, built by Mindful Labs Inc. It organizes counseling records securely and carries the work forward to the next session.
schema.softwareDescription: A safe AI partner for counselors. From session transcripts to case conceptualization and genograms, Modalia AI handles your whole counseling workflow in one secure place.

featureList: Automatic speaker separation for counselor and client
Detection of non-verbal cues such as silence and sighs
Support for case conceptualization and session analysis
Automatic conversion into institutional formats (family centers, EAP, and more)
Security by design: encryption before storage and separated access permissions
Client data is never used to train AI models
Optional automatic deletion of audio files after analysis
